PowerShell($dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.9/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.9-bin.zip" -OutFile "$dest\\maven.zip"; "Download fertig: $\(\(Get-Item "$dest\\maven.zip"\).Length / 1MB\) MB")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); $ok = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/settings" -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } }; if \($ok\) { $r.Content } else { "APP NICHT ERREICHBAR" })
